title: Lesson 79: (Grammar) - at (place, time); in; on; during; to (direction, s...

intro_cards.title: Particle に: Direction, Time & Target
intro_cards.body:
に is a precise 'pointer' — it points to a place, time, or person.

1. Direction/Destination:
• 東京に行きます。(I go to Tokyo.)

2. Point in time:
• 7時に起きます。(I wake up at 7.)

3. Existence location (with います/あります):
• 公園に犬がいます。(There's a dog in the park.)

4. Indirect object/recipient:
• 母に手紙を書きます。(I write a letter to my mother.)

Tip: に = static pointer; で = where action happens.
